note: Two text-matching sources (testpdr.online/manualov q672 and pomahach.com) mark 'Повинен завжди' (our option 2) correct, per ПДР 16.11: a driver turning at an intersection must yield to pedestrians crossing the carriageway he turns onto along the sidewalk continuation. Our stored answer is 1 ('Не повинен'). Official pdr.infotech.gov.ua/ticket/4558 hosts the identical question/options but did not expose the marked key.
